author: Konrad
message: TECS: Combine both airspeed and airspeed derivative filters in TECS into one MIMO filter using a steady state Kalman filter.

author: Konrad
message: TECS: Updated throttle control for airspeed sensorless vehicles. It includes the P gain controller instead of feedforward only. I term is still disabled.

author: Konrad
message: TECS: Rearrange setpoint input. If an altitude rate is given, use this as a feedforward term in the altitude control. If an altitude setpoint is given use a reference model to get a smooth altitude setpoint.

message: TECS: Fix bug to reset airspeed derivative and energy rate low pass filters at every time step.
